items.q: Do I see the logo before production?
items.a: Always. You receive a digital proof and approve it before we touch any apparel.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subhead: Answers to the most common questions.

1.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
1.a: Six pieces for embroidery, twelve for screen print. If you need a smaller quantity, write to us — we work something out in most cases.

2.q: What are your production lead times?
2.a: Five business days after proof approval for most items. Embroidered jackets and orders over 200 units may need up to ten business days.

3.q: What payment methods do you accept?
3.a: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) on the site, Interac e-transfer, and bank transfer for corporate accounts. Full payment is required at order time, except for established recurring accounts.

4.q: Can I change my order after placing it?
4.a: Yes, as long as the proof has not been approved. Once production starts, no changes are possible. Write to us as soon as possible if you need to change a quantity, color, or size.

1.q: What file formats do you accept for the logo?
1.a: PDF, AI, EPS, SVG are ideal for embroidery and screen print. High-resolution PNG and JPG (300 DPI minimum) also work. If your file is not optimal, our team redraws it free of charge for orders of 12 units or more.

2.q: How many colors can my logo have?
2.a: Embroidery: up to 15 colors with no significant extra cost. Screen print: each color adds a screen, so cost rises beyond 4 colors. For photo-realistic designs, we recommend direct-to-garment (DTG) printing.

3.q: Embroidery or screen print — which should I pick?
3.a: Embroidery for polos, caps, jackets, and anything that has to last five years or more. Screen print for high-quantity tees and sweaters with vivid colors. We help you choose based on garment, run size, and logo type.

4.q: Will I see a proof before production?
4.a: Always. You receive a digital proof within 24 business hours of your order. You approve or request adjustments. Production never starts without your sign-off.

1.a: We ship throughout Quebec and Ontario. For other provinces, contact us — we calculate shipping based on destination and weight.

2.a: One to three business days after production, depending on destination. Greater Montreal and Laval: 1 to 2 days. Rest of Quebec and Ontario: 2 to 3 days.

3.q: How can I track my order?
3.a: You receive an email with your tracking number (Canada Post or Purolator) as soon as your order leaves our shop. Track progress in real time on the carrier's website.

1.q: Can I return a customized garment?
1.a: Customized garments are non-refundable, except in the case of a production defect on our end. This is the standard rule across the industry: we cannot resell a polo embroidered with another company's name.

2.q: What if a garment has a defect?
2.a: Write to us within 14 days of receipt with a photo of the defect. We replace or refund, depending on the case. Our warranty covers decoration and stitching quality.

3.q: What if a garment tears after a few months of wear?
3.a: If the tear is due to a manufacturing defect (failing seam, defective fabric), we handle the return with the manufacturer. Normal wear or accidents are not covered, but we can help you reorder quickly.

1.q: Do you have a size guide?
1.a: Yes. Each product has its own size guide (exact measurements in inches and centimeters) on its product page. Fits vary across manufacturers.

2.a: For orders of 50 units or more, we can offer adjusted models (women's cut, athletic fit, plus sizes). Request a quote and we will advise based on your team.

1.a: A ready-to-wear kit for your team: a mix of polos, tees, hoodies, and caps embroidered with your logo, delivered in a single order. Ideal for new hires or seasonal refresh.

2.q: Can we open a recurring account?
2.a: Yes. For companies that order regularly, we keep your design on file, lock in a unit price, and streamline reordering. Net 30 available after credit verification.

3.q: How do I request a high-volume quote?
3.a: For 50 units or more, use our quote form or write to us directly. We respond within one business day with pricing, a timeline, and product recommendations.

cta.headline: Didn't find your answer?
cta.subhead: Our team replies within one business day. Phone, email, or form — pick your channel.

hero.headline: Quebec embroidery and screen-print shop since 2021
hero.subhead: 33,000+ garments delivered to 500+ businesses, with no compromise on quality or lead time.

story.heading: Our story
story.p1: Vision Affichage was born from a simple observation: Quebec SMBs deserve professional uniforms without having to deal with international suppliers or absurd minimums.
story.p2: We are a team of specialists based in Blainville. We embroider and print locally, control every step of production, and guarantee delivery in 5 business days after proof approval.
story.p3: No endless catalog. No clickable links to a factory in Asia. Our strength is operational simplicity.

values.heading: Our values
values.subhead: Three simple principles that guide every order we ship.

local.title: Local production
local.body: Everything is made in Quebec, in our Blainville shop. No international subcontracting.

french.title: Service in French
french.body: Our entire team speaks French. You don't have to negotiate in English with an offshore agent.

leadtime.title: Lead times honored
leadtime.body: 5 business days after approval. If we miss the deadline, we own it.

industries.heading: Industries we outfit
industries.subhead: Each sector has its own constraints: cold, sweat, industrial laundering, customer image. We adapt fabric and decoration to the field.

cta.headline: Let's outfit your team.
cta.subhead: Browse our catalog or request a quote for volumes of 50+ units.

hero.headline: From order to delivery in 5 business days
hero.subhead: Five simple steps: you choose, you upload, we verify, we produce, we ship. No surprises.

steps.heading: The 5-step process
steps.subhead: Designed to spare you unnecessary back-and-forth. Each step has a clear deliverable and an announced lead time.

1.title: Pick your apparel
1.body: Tees, hoodies, polos, caps, beanies. Choose what fits your team on the product page or via a quote for 50+ unit volumes.

2.title: Upload your logo
2.body: PDF, AI, SVG, PNG, or JPG. Our tool shows the position and approximate rendering.

3.title: We verify your proof
3.body: Within 24 business hours, we send you a digital proof. You approve or request adjustments.

4.title: Local production in 5 business days
4.body: Once the proof is approved, we launch production in our Blainville shop.

5.title: Delivery to Quebec and Ontario
5.body: Canada Post or Purolator depending on quantity. You receive a tracking number.

methods.heading: Embroidery or screen print?
methods.subhead: The right choice depends on the garment, the logo, and the run size. Here's how we decide.

screenprint.name: Screen print
screenprint.unitCost: More economical at high run size

factors.heading: What factors influence lead time?
factors.subhead: Standard lead time is 5 business days after approval. Three factors can stretch it slightly.

1.title: Quantity
1.body: Beyond 200 units, we batch production to maintain quality. Plan for 7 to 10 business days for very large volumes.

2.title: Logo complexity
2.body: A simple logo is digitized within hours. A highly detailed or multi-color logo can require 1 to 2 extra prep days.

3.title: Time of year
3.body: September (back-to-work) and November–December (holidays) are our peak periods. Book production early to lock in the standard lead time.

3.title: You order or request a quote
3.desc: Browse our catalogue or request a full quote. The kit cost is credited on your first order.

1.q: How much does the kit cost?
1.a: Between $49.95 and $79.95 depending on the kit type. The cost covers the garments, sample embroidery and round-trip shipping.

2.q: Is the cost refunded on my first order?
2.a: Yes. The full amount paid for the kit is automatically credited on your first team order (minimum 12 pieces).

3.a: You can keep the garments or return them with the prepaid label. No purchase obligation.

4.q: What's the delivery time for the kit?
4.a: Your kit ships from our workshop within 2 business days. Free delivery anywhere in Canada in 3 to 5 days.

handoff.title: Not the right match?
handoff.body: If none of the kits matches your needs, request a direct quote and we'll build a custom kit for your team.

4.q: How long does the decoration last?
4.a: Our embroidery holds for five years under commercial wash cycles. Screen printing on quality fabric lasts two to three years depending on use.

1.title: Choose your apparel
1.desc: Browse the catalog or order a discovery kit to touch three samples first.

2.title: We approve your logo
2.desc: We digitize and send a proof. You approve before we touch any apparel.

3.title: Receive in 5 business days

1.q: What is your production lead time?
1.a: Five business days after logo approval. For rush orders, talk to us — we can often accelerate.

2.a: Twelve units for embroidery, twenty-four for screen printing. For smaller quantities, we'll work something out.

3.q: How do I submit my logo?
3.a: Upload a PDF, AI, SVG, PNG, or JPG. We check the quality and show you a proof to approve before we touch any apparel.

4.a: Québec and Ontario by default, with carriers we know well. Other provinces available on request.

5.q: What is the difference between embroidery and screen printing?
5.a: Embroidery suits simple logos on polos, caps, and beanies: durable, raised texture. Screen printing works on all apparel and supports more colors.

6.q: Can I reorder the same order?
6.a: Yes. Your logo, sizes, and colors are kept on file. Reordering the same thing takes thirty seconds.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: Vision Affichage Inc. respects your privacy and complies with Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector (Law 25). This document describes what information we collect, how we use it, and the rights you can exercise.
privacy.phase3Note: This policy will be reviewed by our legal counsel before public launch (Phase 3).

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.body:
Vision Affichage Inc.
Blainville, Quebec, Canada
Email: contact@visionaffichage.com
Personal information officer: TBA.

dataCollected.heading: Data we collect
dataCollected.body:
• Identification: name, email, phone, company name.
• Order: selected products, sizes, quantities, customization options.
• Shipping: shipping and billing addresses.
• Logo files and any artwork provided for production.
• Cookies: see the Cookie policy.

whyCollected.heading: Why we collect it
whyCollected.body:
• Order fulfillment (production, shipping, billing).
• Transactional communications (confirmations, follow-ups, proofs).
• Service improvement, but only with your explicit consent.
• Legal and accounting obligations.

rightsLoi25.heading: Your rights under Law 25
rightsLoi25.body:
• Right to access your information.
• Right to rectification.
• Right to deletion (right to be forgotten) where applicable.
• Right to data portability.
• Right to withdraw consent at any time.
• Right to file a complaint with the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec (CAI).

contactUs.heading: How to reach us
contactUs.body:
To exercise your rights or ask a question:
Email: privacy@visionaffichage.com (placeholder)
Phone: 1-800 (placeholder)
We respond within a maximum of 30 days.

retention.heading: Data retention
retention.body:
• Order data: 7 years (accounting and tax obligations).
• Logo files and proofs: 3 years after the last order.
• Cookies: 1 year maximum (see Cookie policy).
• Inactive accounts: deleted on request.

thirdCountries.heading: Third countries and providers
thirdCountries.body:
Your data is stored in Canada whenever possible:
• Vercel / AWS (Canada region).
• Stripe Canada for payments.
• Canadian transactional email providers.
A transfer outside Quebec only occurs when strictly necessary for service delivery, with the contractual protections required by Law 25.

modifications.heading: Policy modifications
modifications.body: Any material modification will be announced on this page and, when relevant, by email. The date at the top of the page indicates the last update.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We use HTTPS, encryption at rest where applicable, restricted access to authorized personnel, and regular backups. No system is infallible — you will be notified in the event of a significant incident.

review.heading: Legal review
review.body: This document is a Phase-3 draft. It will be reviewed and signed off by our legal counsel before official public launch.

cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.intro: Vision Affichage uses a minimal set of cookies. You can adjust your preferences at any time from the consent banner.
cookies.manage: To change your preferences, delete the va-consent-v1 cookie in your browser or contact us at privacy@visionaffichage.com.
